combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
The Vortex
0
We’ve got big-ass burgers, boozy cocktails, & local brews!  What more could you even want?  Oh, wait!  We also have *mostly* vegan, vegetarian, & non-alcoholic options available to those that choose not to indulge in our wild side.  There’s something for everyone!  So, consider this your invitation to come on in and check us out!  We’re the only place where it’s good to be bad.
Good for your Liver,
Bad for your Health

Booze Menu

More Info
More Info
Idiot-Free Zone
You’re here to have some damn delicious food and have a great time. And since it turns out that common sense ain’t so common, we wrote down some rules to make sure everyone has just that–a great time.
Our Rules
About
The Vortex Bar & Grill
We’ve been around since 1992, serving the best burgers in Atlanta. You won’t find anyone under 21 here but you will find our diehard fans sitting right next to the wide-eyed tourists. Because at the end of the day we all want the same thing–a place to hang out and eat delicious food. Want to know even more about what you’re getting into? Click that button down there.
Learn More

--- Page: /food-menu ---
Food Menu — The Vortex
0
Food Menu
Like An Orgy For Your Tastebuds™
If you’re looking for some ridiculously indulgent bar food – you’ve come to the right place. We serve up apps you’ll want to fight over, from-scratch chili, delicious sandwiches, and the best damn burgers in Atlanta. This is exactly the kind of place your momma warned you about. It’s good to be bad. We’re here to help.
Order Online
Appetizers
These Group Snacks are the perfect way to get the party started by sharing them with your friends. Or you can be a big glutton and order one all for yourself. That’s okay. We’re not about judgment unless it’s bad judgment.
CHEESE-BALLS O’ GLORY
$10.95
These battered, deep-fried dollops of cheese curd and jalapeño might be the tastiest balls you ever put in your mouth. Served with jalapeño ranch for dipping, this bounty of balls is perfect for sharing.
MUTHACLUCKIN’ CHICKEN ROLLS
$11.95
Chili-seasoned shredded chicken, cheese, onions, and cilantro rolled into mini burritos and deep-fried. We slice ‘em up for sharing (or keep them all to yourself). Served with jalapeño ranch for dipping.
”
AS-IS” only
MAC ‘N’ CHEESE CHANGA
$11.95
We fill a flour tortilla with macaroni ‘n’ cheese and barbecued pulled pork, and wrap it up like a burrito. Then we deep-fry it, slice it into four pieces, top it with a drizzle of our cheesy-cheese goo, and serve it with a side of spicy honey BBQ sauce. It’s like a whole damn barbecue is happening inside your mouth.
”
AS-IS” only
LAUGHING SKULL ONION RINGS
$11.95
A big bowl of crispy onion rings, hand-breaded and battered with our Laughing Skull Amber Ale. Served with Vortex Sauce for dipping.
FRIED PICKLES OF LOVE
$9.95
Crispy, crunchy dill pickles, battered, breaded, and deep-fried to perfection. Served with a side ofjalapeño ranch for dipping. Just like your sweet old Mee Maw used to make. Bless her heart.
BADASS BUFFALO WINGS
$MKT
Five deep-fried chicken wings served with celery and a side of blue cheese or ranch dressing. You can also add a side of french fries or tater tots for +$3.00.
Choose your flavor from the sauce selection below:
ORIGINAL BUFFALO SAUCE
- Standard Heat
SPICY HONEY BBQ SAUCE
- A Little Spicy
ATOMIC DEATH SAUCE
- Hot as Hell, No Returns
Chilis, Soups & Salads
50/50 CHILI
Cup $4.25 | Bowl $4.95
A half-serving of Spicy Beef Chili and a half-serving of Tasty Turkey Chili all mixed together in the same cup or bowl. It’s the best of both worlds.
KILLER TOMATO SOUP
Cup $4.25 | Bowl $4.95
This smooth and savory soup is not vegan or vegetarian because it contains cream and chicken stock, which is why it’s so damned delicious.
We whip up stock pots of love from scratch every day. Our chili is served with homemade cornbread and can be topped with shredded cheese, diced onion, and/or sour cream. Our soup is served with crackers.
SPICY BEEF CHILI
Cup $4.25 | Bowl $4.95
Made with ground sirloin, chipotle peppers, cayenne pepper, and a secret combination of seasoning, but not a single bean. It’s mighty me

--- Page: /booze-menu ---
Booze Menu — The Vortex
0
Booze Menu
Make Your Liver Earn Its Keep™
The Vortex offers a comprehensive selection of booze that includes a bunch of great local brews and other beers, Atlanta’s largest selection of single-malt scotch, and a huge variety of quality spirits, all at remarkably reasonable prices. We also feature some crazy specialty cocktails. Our bartenders are fun and knowledgeable, and can always whip up a drink that’s right for you.
L5P Booze Menu
Midtown Booze Menu
Featured Items
BOOZE-FREE COCKTAIL
Ask your server or bartender which canned mocktail we have in stock.
NON-ALCOHOLIC BEER
Ask your server or bartender which alcohol-free beer we have in stock.
ROTATING BEERS
We have several rotating drafts and cans in our selection.  Ask your server or bartender what we’re currently pouring.

meta.meta_description: Atlanta’s best burgers and bar since 1992. Come get sucked into The Vortex.
